headline: Is Mastercard (MA) Cheap Or Fully Valued On Vocalink Sale Talk?
summary: Mastercard (MA) is reportedly considering selling a majority stake in its UK payments subsidiary Vocalink to British banks, a move that could reshape the company’s exposure to critical UK payment infrastructure. See our latest analysis for Mastercard. Recent headlines around a potential Vocalink sale, Berkshire Hathaway exiting its position and upcoming earnings have come against a mixed backdrop for Mastercard, with the share price returning 9.9% over 30 days but the year-to-date share price...
